name: Gingered Chicken Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the chicken, scallions, peas, bean sprouts, and mushrooms in a large bowl.
2. In a separate small bowl, combine the soy sauce, ginger, oil, sesame oil, lemon juice, and garlic.
3. Toss the dressing with the chicken mixture until evenly coated.
4. If desired, transfer the salad to a bed of lettuce on a serving platter and arrange watercress around it.
